# Evolve Sprouts

> Evolve Sprouts is a Montessori-informed family support and auntie training
> service for families with children aged 0-6 in Hong Kong. Founded by Ida
> De Gregorio, a Montessori-certified practitioner and mother of two, Evolve
> Sprouts trains domestic helpers ("aunties") to become Montessori-guided child
> development partners using practical routines, gentle discipline, and
> child-led strategies adapted for Hong Kong homes.

## What We Do

- [Home](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/): Overview of Evolve Sprouts services, testimonials, course highlights, and free parenting resources.
- [My Best Auntie Training Course](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/services/my-best-auntie-training-course/): A 6-hour interactive Montessori training course for domestic helpers covering home setup, gentle discipline, and fostering independence. Priced at HKD 9,000 with rolling cohorts for ages 0-1, 1-3, and 3-6.
- [About Us](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/about-us/): Ida's story, Montessori journey, mission, and the philosophy behind Evolve Sprouts.
- [Events](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/events/): Upcoming Montessori-based training events and workshops for helpers and parents in Hong Kong.
- [Contact Us](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/contact-us/): Contact form, WhatsApp, email, and social media links to reach Evolve Sprouts.
- [FAQ](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/en/about-us/#faq): Frequently asked questions about services, pricing, Montessori approach, helper training, and suitability for Hong Kong families.

## Key Information

- **Location**: Hong Kong (Mid-Levels area; Goldwin Heights, 2 Seymour Road)
- **Area served**: Hong Kong
- **Languages**: English, Simplified Chinese (简体中文), Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)
- **Founded by**: Ida De Gregorio, Montessori-certified practitioner
- **Target audience**: Families with children aged 0-6 in Hong Kong, especially those working with domestic helpers
- **Training format**: Small group, in-person sessions over 3 weeks (3 sessions of 2 hours each)
- **Course price**: HKD 9,000 per participant

## Services

- **My Best Auntie Training Course**: 6-hour interactive Montessori training for domestic helpers, split across 3 weekly sessions. Covers home environment setup, gentle guidance and clear boundaries, and fostering independence. Includes live practice training, post-course auntie review, family routine workbook, home setup walkthrough, communication scripts toolkit, and confidence booster coaching.
- **Consultation sessions**: Personalised family support and guidance.
- **Home setup guidance**: Practical Montessori-adapted space setup for small Hong Kong apartments.
- **Parent support**: Ongoing coaching and resources for families.
- **Free resources**: Downloadable guides on gentle parenting (e.g., "4 Simple Ways to Teach Patience to Young Children").
- **Community newsletter**: Monthly Sprouts Squad newsletter for families.

## What We Do Not Do

- Evolve Sprouts does not provide childcare or nanny placement services.
- Evolve Sprouts does not offer online-only training courses (training is in-person in Hong Kong).
- Evolve Sprouts is not a Montessori school or daycare facility.
- Evolve Sprouts does not guarantee specific child behavior outcomes.

## Contact

- **Email**: ida@evolvesprouts.com
- **WhatsApp**: Available via website contact button
- **Website**: https://www.evolvesprouts.com
- **Response time**: 24-48 hours

- [Extended AI context](https://www.evolvesprouts.com/llms-full.txt): Comprehensive content including full FAQ, course details, and testimonials for deeper AI understanding.
